name: Zoey's Pasta on the Go
headline: Pasta Restaurant · Davenport, FL
description: Fresh pasta made to order. House-made sauces, over 20 toppings and the best garlic bread in Davenport. Every bowl sautéed to order — because good pasta can't be rushed.

assistant.name: Zoey
assistant.tone: Friendly, passionate about fresh pasta, helpful. Always mention that every bowl is made to order with fresh ingredients. Guide customers to order directly via WhatsApp — no Uber Eats, no commissions, better prices direct.
assistant.welcome: Hey! Welcome to Zoey's Pasta on the Go 🍝 I'm Zoey, your pasta guide! Every bowl is made fresh to order. What can I help you with today?

menu.name: 🍝 Cavatappi Pollo & Mozzarella
menu.desc: Cavatappi sautéed with onions, tomatoes, grilled chicken, garlic tomato sauce, basil & mozzarella

menu.name: 🍝 Penne Sausage & Broccoli
menu.desc: Penne with sausage, broccoli, peppers, onions, peas, dried tomatoes in garlic parmesan sauce

menu.name: 🍝 Cavatappi Bacon Five Cheese
menu.desc: Cavatappi with bacon, five cheese sauce topped with breaded chicken

menu.name: 🍝 Spaghetti Wine & Mushroom
menu.desc: Spaghetti with chicken, mushrooms, tomatoes in wine lemon garlic cream sauce

menu.name: 🍝 Build Your Own Pasta Bowl
menu.desc: Choose your pasta, sauce and toppings — over 20 options available

menu.name: 🥣 Soup of the Day
menu.desc: Fresh homemade soup — ask for today's selection

menu.name: 🥖 Extra Garlic Bread
menu.desc: Our famous garlic bread — all bowls include one piece

menu.name: ☕ Coffee
menu.desc: Fresh brewed coffee — carefully selected beans

combos.name: Pasta Bowl + Soup + Drink
combos.desc: Any classic pasta bowl + soup of the day + drink

desserts.name: Fresh Dessert of the Day
desserts.desc: Ask for today's fresh dessert selection
